issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for parsing failures or missing grammars.
The skill is designed for browser-based execution and may not work on non-browser AI agents.

scenarios.name: Parse TypeScript with tree-sitter WASM and extract nodes
scenarios.rationale: Both use web-tree-sitter setup and walk tree.rootNode for function/class via childForFieldName; treatment also captures file/import nodes and full CodeNode shape.

scenarios.name: Graph RAG search using Xenova transformers in the browser
scenarios.rationale: Both use Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 with mean pooling and normalized cosine top-K; treatment adds graph-aware embedding text and end-to-end LLM context wiring.
